---
title: "report_constrained_equilibrium_maximum_margin_oligopoly"
author: "Daisy Dan Song"
date: "2024-05-11"
output: html_document
---
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE
  )
rm(list = ls())
library(Dispatching)
library(foreach)
library(magrittr)
library(codetools)
library(ggplot2)
library(kableExtra)
```

# Set constant

```{r}
seed <- 1
set.seed(seed)
n_ths <- 3
n_market <- 1
n_zone <- 1
t <- 1
j <- 1
multistart <- 10
use_rcpp <- TRUE
```

# impose baseline setting

```{r}
# generate template
equilibrium <-
  generate_equilibrium(
    n_ths = n_ths,
    n_market = n_market,
    n_zone = n_zone,
    seed = seed
  )
```

# check lower bound of m_bar

```{r}
m_w <- equilibrium$parameter$m_w
m_f <- equilibrium$parameter$m_f
beta_w <- equilibrium$parameter$beta_w
lambda_w <- equilibrium$parameter$lambda_w
gamma_w <- equilibrium$parameter$gamma_w
beta_f <- equilibrium$parameter$beta_f
lambda_f <- equilibrium$parameter$lambda_f
gamma_f <- equilibrium$parameter$gamma_f
x_a_w <- equilibrium$exogenous[[t]][[j]]$x_a_w
x_a_f <- equilibrium$exogenous[[t]][[j]]$x_a_f
x_c_w <- equilibrium$exogenous[[t]][[j]]$x_c_w
x_c_f <- equilibrium$exogenous[[t]][[j]]$x_c_f
size_w <- equilibrium$exogenous[[t]][[j]]$size_w
size_f <- equilibrium$exogenous[[t]][[j]]$size_f
w_0 <- equilibrium$exogenous[[t]][[j]]$w_0
owner <- equilibrium$exogenous[[t]][[j]]$owner
mu <- equilibrium$shock[[t]][[j]]$mu
ea_w <- equilibrium$shock[[t]][[j]]$ea_w
ec_w <- equilibrium$shock[[t]][[j]]$ec_w
ea_f <- equilibrium$shock[[t]][[j]]$ea_f
ec_f <- equilibrium$shock[[t]][[j]]$ec_f
w <- equilibrium$endogenous[[t]][[j]]$w
f <- equilibrium$endogenous[[t]][[j]]$f
s_f <- equilibrium$endogenous[[t]][[j]]$s_f
method_s_w <- equilibrium$constant$method_s_w
margin <- equilibrium$constant$margin
quadrature_size <- equilibrium$constant$quadrature_size
tol <- equilibrium$constant$tol

bound <-
  compute_monopoly_bound_tj(
    m_w = m_w,
    m_f = m_f,
    beta_w = beta_w,
    beta_f = beta_f,
    gamma_w = gamma_w,
    gamma_f = gamma_f,
    lambda_w = lambda_w,
    lambda_f = lambda_f,
    x_a_w = x_a_w,
    x_a_f = x_a_f,
    x_c_w = x_c_w,
    x_c_f = x_c_f,
    w_0 = w_0,
    size_w = size_w,
    size_f = size_f,
    owner = owner,
    mu = mu,
    ea_w = ea_w,
    ea_f = ea_f,
    ec_w = ec_w,
    ec_f = ec_f,
    w = w,
    f = f,
    s_f = s_f,
    method_s_w = method_s_w,
    margin = margin,
    quadrature_size = quadrature_size,
    tol = tol,
    use_rcpp = use_rcpp
  )
bound <-
  relax_bound_tj(
    bound = bound
  )

c_w <- 
  compute_c_w_tj(
    gamma_w = gamma_w,
    x_c_w = x_c_w,
    ec_w = ec_w
  ) 

(
  bound$upper[
    1:(length(w) - 1)
    ] +
  c_w[
    2:length(w)
    ]-
  bound$upper[
    1:(length(w) - 1)
    ]
)/(
  bound$upper[
    1:(length(w) - 1)
    ] +
    c_w[2:length(w)]
  )
```

# start from unconstrained solution
```{r}
eq1_nleqslv <-
  solve_equilibrium_tj(
    t = t,
    j = j,
    equilibrium = equilibrium,
    solver = "nleqslv",
    multistart = multistart,
    use_rcpp = use_rcpp
  )
equilibrium$endogenous[[t]][[j]]$w <- eq1_nleqslv$endogenous[[t]][[j]]$w
equilibrium$endogenous[[t]][[j]]$f <- eq1_nleqslv$endogenous[[t]][[j]]$f
w <- equilibrium$endogenous[[t]][[j]]$w
f <- equilibrium$endogenous[[t]][[j]]$f
w
f
```


# threshold 
```{r}
(f[2:length(f)] - w[2:length(w)])/f[2:length(f)]
```

# m_bar
```{r}
m_bar <- 0.3
m_bar
```

# solve constrained equilibrium
```{r}
eq_constrained <- 
  solve_equilibrium_multiple_initials_maximum_margin_nleqslv_tj(
    t = t,
    j = j,
    equilibrium = equilibrium, 
    solver = "nleqslv",
    m_bar = m_bar
  )
eq_constrained
```

## display eta_f
```{r}
m_w <- eq_constrained$parameter$m_w
m_f <- eq_constrained$parameter$m_f
beta_f <- eq_constrained$parameter$beta_f
beta_w <- eq_constrained$parameter$beta_w
gamma_f <- eq_constrained$parameter$gamma_f
gamma_w <- eq_constrained$parameter$gamma_w
size_w <- eq_constrained$exogenous[[t]][[j]]$size_w
size_f <- eq_constrained$exogenous[[t]][[j]]$size_f
lambda_f <- eq_constrained$parameter$lambda_f
lambda_w <- eq_constrained$parameter$lambda_w
mu <- eq_constrained$shock[[t]][[j]]$mu
s_f <- eq_constrained$endogenous[[t]][[j]]$s_f
ea_f <- eq_constrained$shock[[t]][[j]]$ea_f
ec_f <- eq_constrained$shock[[t]][[j]]$ec_f
ea_w <- eq_constrained$shock[[t]][[j]]$ea_w
ec_w <- eq_constrained$shock[[t]][[j]]$ec_w
x_a <- eq_constrained$exogenous[[t]][[j]]$x_a
x_c <- eq_constrained$exogenous[[t]][[j]]$x_c
f <- eq_constrained$endogenous[[t]][[j]]$f
s_f <- eq_constrained$endogenous[[t]][[j]]$s_f
s_w <- eq_constrained$endogenous[[t]][[j]]$s_w
w <- eq_constrained$endogenous[[t]][[j]]$w
eta_f <- eq_constrained$endogenous[[t]][[j]]$eta_f
owner <- eq_constrained$exogenous[[t]][[j]]$owner
margin <- eq_constrained$constant$margin
quadrature_size <- eq_constrained$constant$quadrature_size
tol <- eq_constrained$constant$tol
w_0 <- eq_constrained$exogenous[[t]][[j]]$w_0

eta_f
```

## compute profit
```{r}
compute_profit_ths_tj(
  m_w = m_w,
  m_f = m_f,
  gamma_w = gamma_w,
  gamma_f = gamma_f,
  x_c_w = x_c_w,
  x_c_f = x_c_f,
  size_w = size_w,
  size_f = size_f,
  owner = owner,
  mu = mu,
  ec_w = ec_w,
  ec_f = ec_f,
  w = w,
  f = f,
  s_w = s_w,
  s_f = s_f
) 
```

# compute augmented foc
```{r}
compute_foc_maximum_margin_tj(
  m_w = m_w,
  m_f = m_f,
  beta_w = beta_w,
  beta_f = beta_f,
  gamma_w = gamma_w,
  gamma_f = gamma_f,
  lambda_w = lambda_w,
  lambda_f = lambda_f,
  x_a_w = x_a_w,
  x_a_f = x_a_f,
  x_c_w = x_c_w,
  x_c_f = x_c_f,
  size_w = size_w,
  size_f = size_f,
  owner = owner,
  mu = mu,
  ea_w = ea_w,
  ea_f = ea_f,
  ec_w = ec_w,
  ec_f = ec_f,
  w = w,
  f = f,
  s_f = s_f,
  eta_f = eta_f,
  m_bar = m_bar,
  method_s_w = "exact",
  margin = margin,
  quadrature_size = quadrature_size,
  tol = tol,
  use_rcpp = use_rcpp
)  
```

### foc_shape_w

```{r}
g <-
  seq(
    -10,
    20,
    by = 0.1
  ) %>%
  purrr::map(
    function(x) {
      w_x <- w
      w_x[2] <- x
      foc <-
        compute_foc_maximum_margin_tj(
          m_w = m_w,
          m_f = m_f,
          beta_w = beta_w,
          beta_f = beta_f,
          gamma_w = gamma_w,
          gamma_f = gamma_f,
          lambda_w = lambda_w,
          lambda_f = lambda_f,
          x_a_w = x_a_w,
          x_a_f = x_a_f,
          x_c_w = x_c_w,
          x_c_f = x_c_f,
          size_w = size_w,
          size_f = size_f,
          owner = owner,
          mu = mu,
          ea_w = ea_w,
          ea_f = ea_f,
          ec_w = ec_w,
          ec_f = ec_f,
          w = w,
          f = f,
          s_f = s_f,
          eta_f = eta_f,
          m_bar = m_bar,
          method_s_w = "exact",
          margin = margin,
          quadrature_size = quadrature_size,
          tol = tol,
          use_rcpp = use_rcpp
        )  
      return(
        tibble::tibble(
          x = x,
          aug_foc_w = foc[1]
        )
      )
    }
  ) %>%
  dplyr::bind_rows()

g %>%
  ggplot(
    aes(
      x = x,
      y = aug_foc_w
    )
  ) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_hline(
    yintercept = 0,
    linetype = "dashed"
  ) +
  geom_vline(
    xintercept = w[2],
    linetype = "dashed"
  ) +
  theme_classic()
```


### foc_shape_f
```{r}
g <-
  seq(
    -10,
    15,
    by = 0.1
  ) %>%
  purrr::map(
    function(x) {
      f_x <- f
      f_x[2] <- x
      foc <-
        compute_foc_maximum_margin_tj(
          m_w = m_w,
          m_f = m_f,
          beta_w = beta_w,
          beta_f = beta_f,
          gamma_w = gamma_w,
          gamma_f = gamma_f,
          lambda_w = lambda_w,
          lambda_f = lambda_f,
          x_a_w = x_a_w,
          x_a_f = x_a_f,
          x_c_w = x_c_w,
          x_c_f = x_c_f,
          size_w = size_w,
          size_f = size_f,
          owner = owner,
          mu = mu,
          ea_w = ea_w,
          ea_f = ea_f,
          ec_w = ec_w,
          ec_f = ec_f,
          w = w,
          f = f,
          s_f = s_f,
          eta_f = eta_f,
          m_bar = m_bar,
          method_s_w = "exact",
          margin = margin,
          quadrature_size = quadrature_size,
          tol = tol,
          use_rcpp = use_rcpp
        )  
      return(
        tibble::tibble(
          x = x,
          aug_foc_f = foc[2]
        )
      )
    }
  ) %>%
  dplyr::bind_rows()

g %>%
  ggplot(
    aes(
      x = x,
      y = aug_foc_f
    )
  ) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_hline(
    yintercept = 0,
    linetype = "dashed"
  ) +
  geom_vline(
    xintercept = f[2],
    linetype = "dashed"
  ) +
  theme_classic()
```
